title: KüA Plan Entry Submission
description: An entry to be submitted by a participant for publishing in the KüA Plan. This is a subset of the Entry schema

id.description: The unique identifier of the new entry. Should be generated as UUIDv7 (time-ordered value) according to RFC9562.

title.description: The subject of the planned KüA (or reservation)

comment.description: A short explanatory comment to be shown together with the subject.

description.description: A longer description of the planned KüA, formatted as Markdown.

timeComment.description: A short comment about the KüA's time (e.g. start after another KüA, "open end", etc.).

room.description: List of unique identifiers of the rooms this entry takes place in.

roomComment.description: A short comment about the KüA's room (e.g. the meeting point or which part of the room).

responsiblePerson.description: Name of the persons responsible for this KüA or blocker

isRoomReservation.description: if present and true, this is not a real KüA announcement, but instead an informative entry to mark this time slot in this room as reserved for some reason (e.g. some non-public meeting).

category.description: The unique identifier of the category this entry belongs to.

submitterComment.description: A comment that is only visible to the orgas of the event, which are moderating the KüA Plan. When omitted, defaults to an empty string.

publishWithoutReview.description: Try to submit the entry to be published immediately, without prior review by the orgas. This is only possible when the event's entrySubmissionMode is 'review-after-publishing' and the entry does not violate other policies. When omitted, defaults to false.
